scene: Tiny Voyager probe with its dish flying away from a cartoon Earth, big black caps 50 YEARS OUT. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
Voyager streaking with speed lines past a tiny astronaut, big black caps FASTEST THING EVER. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
A short measuring line from Earth to Voyager, big black caps = 1 LIGHT-DAY. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

The short line beside an enormously longer line stretching off-frame to a star, big black caps 1,500+ TO THE STAR. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

Earth drawn as a house with a porch, Voyager barely off the porch step, big black caps BARELY OFF THE PORCH. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
